title: Vielit 2 Pack Satin Pillowcase for Hair and Skin Cooling,Soft as Silk Pillowcase for Hair and Skin,Easier Care than Silk Pillow Case Rose 50x75cm Gifts for Women Envelope & 2 Scrunchies
features: PREMIUM SATIN PILLOWCASE: Vielit satin pillow cover is made from premium satin fabric which is OEKO-TEX certified, free from harmful chemicals and eco-friendly.It feels as smooth as silk pillowcase but more easier care than silk pillow case

BEAUTY SLEEP: Vielit satin pillowcase for hair and skin care effectively maintains the skin's moisture and oil balance, reducing friction between hair and pillow. Skin becomes more glowing and hair is smoother and tangle free after use
CONVENIENT USE: Vielit satin pillow case is envelope clousure design which is easy on and off. It is machine washable. Just put it in a laundry bag then start the washer that you can do other things

GIFT SET: With the purchase of Vielit pillowcase you will get 2 pillowcases for 50x75cm pillow and 2 satin scrunchies. They are delivered to you in an envelope shell package like a gift. The satin scrunchies are moderately elastic and can hold your hair well. You can use them when you are having a facial or doing sports
MULTI COLORS: Vielit provides grey, white, black, navy, red, blue, pink,sage green pillow case that could better decorate your bedroom. Decorate your bedroom like a beautiful oasis
description: Product Description Ultra soft silky satin pillowcase in Vielit Why choosing Vielit? Good night with Vielit What they said? Multiple color options to decorate your home into an oasis Previous page Next page About size and colors
